meta.target_note: Requested target_repo did not exist; wolfssl-master in the same workspace was used.
meta.runtime_test_note: Full DTLS 1.3 handshake tests blocked: current CMakeCache disables WOLFSSL_DTLS13/WOLFSSL_DTLS_CID and no wolfSSL binary library exists. Focused source assertion tests were run instead.

results.change_action: may be accepted if verifiable with both secrets
results.change_condition: During a limited transition window after server secret rotation.
results.new_value: accepted under either of two secrets
results.related_state_or_step: server cookie verification after secret change
results.extracted_evidence: If the server wishes to allow legitimate clients to handshake through the transition (e.g., a client received a cookie with Secret 1 and then sent the second ClientHello after the server has changed to Secret 2), the server can have a limited window during which it accepts both secrets. ... An alternative approach is simply to try verifying with both secrets.
results.comment: wolfSSL 支持单个 DTLS 1.3 HRR cookie secret 并允许应用重新设置或随机生成 secret；但没有内建双 secret 过渡窗口，也没有 cookie 时间戳/有效期策略。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: 要求描述的是 cookie secret 轮换/时间窗口策略。代码用 HMAC 绑定 cookie 数据和 peer 地址并用当前 tls13CookieSecret 验证；API 可替换 secret，但验证路径只检查当前 secret，cookie 数据中也没有 timestamp 字段。因此基础完整性验证满足，双 secret 或时间窗口策略属于应用/外部策略，库内只部分覆盖。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
results.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:14083; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6620; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6547; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7145
results.test_check: source_assertions 验证单 secret HMAC cookie 路径；未发现双 secret 或 timestamp 字段。
results.decision_reason: 当前实现支持应用设置/轮换单个 secret 和完整性验证，不提供内建过渡窗口或时间戳过期策略。

results.change_action: invalid if value check fails; terminate handshake
results.change_condition: If a server receives a ClientHello with an invalid cookie.
results.extracted_evidence: If a server receives a ClientHello with an invalid cookie, it MUST terminate the handshake with an "illegal_parameter" alert.
results.comment: 无效 cookie 经 TlsCheckCookie/RestartHandshakeHashWithCookie 返回 HRR_COOKIE_ERROR，错误映射为 illegal_parameter alert。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求收到无效 DTLS 1.3 cookie 时终止握手并发送 illegal_parameter。wolfSSL 在 cookie HMAC 或长度校验失败时返回 HRR_COOKIE_ERROR，ClientHello 处理向上传递该错误，SendAlertNumber 将 HRR_COOKIE_ERROR 映射到 illegal_parameter。

results.change_condition: Server changes the secret value frequently.
results.extracted_evidence: The server can defend against this attack by changing the secret value frequently, thus invalidating those cookies.
results.comment: wolfSSL 支持单个 DTLS 1.3 HRR cookie secret 并允许应用重新设置或随机生成 secret；但没有内建双 secret 过渡窗口，也没有 cookie 时间戳/有效期策略。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: 要求描述的是 cookie secret 轮换/时间窗口策略。代码用 HMAC 绑定 cookie 数据和 peer 地址并用当前 tls13CookieSecret 验证；API 可替换 secret，但验证路径只检查当前 secret，cookie 数据中也没有 timestamp 字段。因此基础完整性验证满足，双 secret 或时间窗口策略属于应用/外部策略，库内只部分覆盖。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
results.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:14083; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6620; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6547; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7145
results.test_check: source_assertions 验证单 secret HMAC cookie 路径；未发现双 secret 或 timestamp 字段。
results.decision_reason: 当前实现支持应用设置/轮换单个 secret 和完整性验证，不提供内建过渡窗口或时间戳过期策略。

results.change_action: invalid if generated outside allowed time interval
results.change_condition: Server stores timestamps in the cookie.
results.extracted_evidence: Alternatively, the server can store timestamps in the cookie and reject cookies that were generated outside a certain interval of time.
results.comment: wolfSSL 支持单个 DTLS 1.3 HRR cookie secret 并允许应用重新设置或随机生成 secret；但没有内建双 secret 过渡窗口，也没有 cookie 时间戳/有效期策略。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: 要求描述的是 cookie secret 轮换/时间窗口策略。代码用 HMAC 绑定 cookie 数据和 peer 地址并用当前 tls13CookieSecret 验证；API 可替换 secret，但验证路径只检查当前 secret，cookie 数据中也没有 timestamp 字段。因此基础完整性验证满足，双 secret 或时间窗口策略属于应用/外部策略，库内只部分覆盖。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
results.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:14083; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6620; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6547; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7145
results.test_check: source_assertions 验证单 secret HMAC cookie 路径；未发现双 secret 或 timestamp 字段。
results.decision_reason: 当前实现支持应用设置/轮换单个 secret 和完整性验证，不提供内建过渡窗口或时间戳过期策略。

results.change_condition: When sending the initial ClientHello, the client does not have a cookie yet.
results.new_value: zero-length vector (a zero-valued single byte length field)
results.extracted_evidence: When sending the initial ClientHello, the client does not have a cookie yet. In this case, the "cookie" extension is omitted and the legacy_cookie field in the ClientHello message MUST be set to a zero-length vector (i.e., a zero-valued single byte length field).
results.comment: 初始 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 写入 legacy_cookie 长度字节；没有 DTLS 1.2 downgrade cookie 时为 0。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求初始 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 的 legacy_cookie 为零长度。wolfSSL 构造 ClientHello 时总是写 cookieSz；只有旧 DTLS downgrade cookie 存在且允许 downgrade 才写入旧 cookie，否则 cookieSz 为 0。

results.change_condition: When the second ClientHello is received.
results.extracted_evidence: When the second ClientHello is received, the server can verify that the cookie is valid and that the client can receive packets at the given IP address.
results.comment: 第二个 ClientHello 的 cookie extension 会被 HMAC、peer 地址和 transcript 重启逻辑验证。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: 要求是第二个 ClientHello 到达时验证 cookie。wolfSSL 在 sendCookie 打开时查找 TLSX_COOKIE，调用 RestartHandshakeHashWithCookie；该函数先用 TlsCheckCookie 验证 HMAC，再用 cookie 中的 Hash/CipherSuite/KeyShare 信息恢复 HRR transcript。

results.change_condition: in DTLS 1.3 ClientHello received by a DTLS 1.3-compliant server
results.old_value: present cookie field value in ClientHello
results.extracted_evidence: For backwards compatibility reasons, the cookie field in the ClientHello is present in DTLS 1.3 but is ignored by a DTLS 1.3-compliant server implementation.
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 解析路径只读取并跳过 legacy_cookie；真正的 DTLS 1.3 cookie 在 cookie extension 中处理。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 说 DTLS 1.3-compliant server 忽略 ClientHello legacy_cookie 字段。wolfSSL 的 downgrade 预解析会跳过该字段，正式 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 解析不使用 legacy_cookie 内容参与 cookie 验证。

results.change_condition: server receives a DTLS 1.3 ClientHello with any other value in this field
results.extracted_evidence: If a DTLS 1.3 ClientHello is received with any other value in this field, the server MUST abort the handshake with an "illegal_parameter" alert.
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 中 legacy_cookie 非零会返回 INVALID_PARAMETER，最终映射为 illegal_parameter。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 同时要求 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello legacy_cookie 必须为零长度，非零时 abort with illegal_parameter。wolfSSL 在 DoTls13ClientHello 中读取 cookieLen，非零立即 ERROR_OUT(INVALID_PARAMETER)，错误映射表把 INVALID_PARAMETER 转为 illegal_parameter。

results.change_condition: For all purposes
results.extracted_evidence: It MUST be ignored for all purposes.
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 明文记录发送路径将 legacy_record_version 写为 {254,253}；接收路径不把该字段用于版本协商。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求除初始 ClientHello 兼容例外外，DTLSPlaintext legacy_record_version 写为 DTLS 1.2 值并被忽略。wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 plaintext header 生成固定写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLSv1_2_MINOR；版本协商实际由 supported_versions 和 TLS 1.3 状态决定，记录头版本只参与旧格式解析/错误排除。

results.change_condition: For all records other than the initial ClientHello
results.extracted_evidence: legacy_record_version: This value MUST be set to {254, 253} for all records other than the initial ClientHello
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 明文记录发送路径将 legacy_record_version 写为 {254,253}；接收路径不把该字段用于版本协商。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求除初始 ClientHello 兼容例外外，DTLSPlaintext legacy_record_version 写为 DTLS 1.2 值并被忽略。wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 plaintext header 生成固定写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLSv1_2_MINOR；版本协商实际由 supported_versions 和 TLS 1.3 状态决定，记录头版本只参与旧格式解析/错误排除。

results.change_condition: For the initial ClientHello (i.e., one not generated after a HelloRetryRequest)
results.extracted_evidence: the initial ClientHello (i.e., one not generated after a HelloRetryRequest), where it may also be {254, 255} for compatibility purposes.
results.comment: 初始 ClientHello 兼容值 {254,255} 属于允许项；wolfSSL 发送端使用 {254,253}，接收端在 TLS 1.3 协商前仍保留 DTLS 记录解析兼容性。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求除初始 ClientHello 兼容例外外，DTLSPlaintext legacy_record_version 写为 DTLS 1.2 值并被忽略。wolfSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 plaintext header 生成固定写 DTLS_MAJOR/DTLSv1_2_MINOR；版本协商实际由 supported_versions 和 TLS 1.3 状态决定，记录头版本只参与旧格式解析/错误排除。

results.change_condition: DTLS servers processing DTLS 1.3 handshake behavior
results.extracted_evidence: DTLS servers MUST NOT echo the "legacy_session_id" value from the client
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 不回显 legacy_session_id，默认 ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 均使用 DTLS 1.2 兼容值。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 5.3 要求 DTLS 1.3 ServerHello legacy_session_id_echo 为空，ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 为 DTLS 1.2 值。wolfSSL 服务端在解析 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 后清空 sessionIDSz，发送 ServerHello 时 DTLS 路径直接写 0；ClientHello 和 ServerHello 都写 major + DTLSv1_2_MINOR。

results.change_condition: client does not have a cached session ID set by a pre-DTLS 1.3 server
results.extracted_evidence: Otherwise, it MUST be set as a zero-length vector (i.e., a zero-valued single byte length field).
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 不回显 legacy_session_id，默认 ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 均使用 DTLS 1.2 兼容值。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 5.3 要求 DTLS 1.3 ServerHello legacy_session_id_echo 为空，ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 为 DTLS 1.2 值。wolfSSL 服务端在解析 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 后清空 sessionIDSz，发送 ServerHello 时 DTLS 路径直接写 0；ClientHello 和 ServerHello 都写 major + DTLSv1_2_MINOR。

results.change_condition: client has a cached session ID set by a pre-DTLS 1.3 server
results.extracted_evidence: A client which has a cached session ID set by a pre-DTLS 1.3 server SHOULD set this field to that value.
results.comment: 通用 TLS 1.3 helper 能写入已有 session ID，但 DTLS 1.3 路径关闭 middlebox compat；未找到明确只在 pre-DTLS 1.3 cached session ID 时发送该值的专门策略。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 的 cached pre-DTLS 1.3 session ID 是兼容性 SHOULD。wolfSSL 的 GetTls13SessionId 可写已有 sessionIDSz，但 DTLS 1.3 初始化禁用 tls13MiddleBoxCompat，服务端也清空并不回显 session ID；没有看到针对“pre-DTLS 1.3 server cached session ID”的独立分支，因此只可证明通用能力，不能证明条件策略完整。
results.category: behavior exists but strict proof is missing
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
results.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:4503; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7707; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7676; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7677
results.test_check: source_assertions 验证 DTLS 1.3 服务端清空/不回显 session ID；未发现 pre-DTLS 1.3 cached session ID 专门策略。
results.decision_reason: 通用 helper 可写 session ID，但 DTLS 1.3 特定条件策略证据不足。

results.change_condition: in DTLS 1.3 ClientHello
results.extracted_evidence: the legacy_version field MUST be set to {254, 253}, which was the version number for DTLS 1.2.
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 不回显 legacy_session_id，默认 ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 均使用 DTLS 1.2 兼容值。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 5.3 要求 DTLS 1.3 ServerHello legacy_session_id_echo 为空，ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 为 DTLS 1.2 值。wolfSSL 服务端在解析 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 后清空 sessionIDSz，发送 ServerHello 时 DTLS 路径直接写 0；ClientHello 和 ServerHello 都写 major + DTLSv1_2_MINOR。

results.change_condition: in DTLS 1.3 ServerHello
results.extracted_evidence: the legacy_version field is set to 0xfefd, indicating DTLS 1.2.
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 不回显 legacy_session_id，默认 ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 均使用 DTLS 1.2 兼容值。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
results.comparison_summary: RFC 5.3 要求 DTLS 1.3 ServerHello legacy_session_id_echo 为空，ClientHello/ServerHello legacy_version 为 DTLS 1.2 值。wolfSSL 服务端在解析 DTLS 1.3 ClientHello 后清空 sessionIDSz，发送 ServerHello 时 DTLS 路径直接写 0；ClientHello 和 ServerHello 都写 major + DTLSv1_2_MINOR。

results.change_condition: for DTLS over TCP or SCTP
results.new_value: must not exceed the maximum record size of 2^14 bytes
results.extracted_evidence: the upper layer protocol MUST NOT write any record that exceeds the maximum record size of 2^14 bytes.
results.comment: 未看到 wolfSSL 对 DTLS-over-TCP/SCTP 记录写入 2^14 上限的专门路径；本仓库 DTLS 实现以 datagram 为主。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: 该条是 DTLS over TCP/SCTP 的上层写入限制。当前代码中的 DTLS 1.3 record builder 使用 word16 length 和 buffer 检查，但没有发现面向 DTLS-over-TCP/SCTP 的专门实现或 2^14 上层写入断言，因此只能部分满足/不适用到常规 UDP DTLS。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
results.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:111; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1268; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1273; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1537
results.test_check: 当前仓库未构建/未发现 DTLS over TCP/SCTP 专门路径；源码级检查无法证明该传输模式写入限制。
results.decision_reason: 要求限定 DTLS over TCP/SCTP，当前目标代码和构建环境以 UDP datagram DTLS 为主，不能形成可靠运行结论。

results.change_condition: for records containing the field
results.new_value: used to determine the boundaries between records
results.extracted_evidence: The length field from DTLS records containing that field can be used to determine the boundaries between records.
results.comment: 统一头解析支持 L bit、有长度字段和无长度字段，发送端当前总是包含 16-bit length。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 允许 DTLSCiphertext 最后一个记录省略 length，并要求显式 length 不能越过当前 datagram。wolfSSL 发送端固定设置 L bit 和 16-bit length；接收端按 L bit 解析，如果未设置则把剩余 datagram 作为记录长度，如果设置则读取 16-bit length 并进行头部/最小密文长度检查。

results.change_action: must be present / must be absent
results.change_condition: for the final record in a datagram
results.extracted_evidence: The final record in a datagram can omit the length field.
results.comment: 发送端没有利用省略 length 的优化，接收端可解析最后记录无 length 的格式。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 允许 DTLSCiphertext 最后一个记录省略 length，并要求显式 length 不能越过当前 datagram。wolfSSL 发送端固定设置 L bit 和 16-bit length；接收端按 L bit 解析，如果未设置则把剩余 datagram 作为记录长度，如果设置则读取 16-bit length 并进行头部/最小密文长度检查。

results.change_condition: if a record has invalid length
results.extracted_evidence: invalid records (e.g., invalid formatting, length, MAC, etc.). In general, invalid records SHOULD be silently discarded
results.comment: 统一头解析支持 L bit、有长度字段和无长度字段，发送端当前总是包含 16-bit length。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 允许 DTLSCiphertext 最后一个记录省略 length，并要求显式 length 不能越过当前 datagram。wolfSSL 发送端固定设置 L bit 和 16-bit length；接收端按 L bit 解析，如果未设置则把剩余 datagram 作为记录长度，如果设置则读取 16-bit length 并进行头部/最小密文长度检查。

results.change_condition: if the length is present
results.extracted_evidence: L:  The L bit (0x04) is set if the length is present.
results.comment: 统一头解析支持 L bit、有长度字段和无长度字段，发送端当前总是包含 16-bit length。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 允许 DTLSCiphertext 最后一个记录省略 length，并要求显式 length 不能越过当前 datagram。wolfSSL 发送端固定设置 L bit 和 16-bit length；接收端按 L bit 解析，如果未设置则把剩余 datagram 作为记录长度，如果设置则读取 16-bit length 并进行头部/最小密文长度检查。

results.change_condition: when omitting the length field
results.extracted_evidence: The length field MAY be omitted by clearing the L bit
results.comment: 统一头解析支持 L bit、有长度字段和无长度字段，发送端当前总是包含 16-bit length。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 允许 DTLSCiphertext 最后一个记录省略 length，并要求显式 length 不能越过当前 datagram。wolfSSL 发送端固定设置 L bit 和 16-bit length；接收端按 L bit 解析，如果未设置则把剩余 datagram 作为记录长度，如果设置则读取 16-bit length 并进行头部/最小密文长度检查。

results.change_action: must only be used for the last record in a datagram
results.change_condition: when omitting the length field
results.extracted_evidence: Omitting the length field MUST only be used for the last record in a datagram.
results.comment: 解析端在 L bit 清除时把剩余 datagram 作为当前记录，但没有独立证明该无长度格式只出现在 datagram 最后一个记录。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 明确省略 length 只能用于 datagram 最后一个记录。wolfSSL 解析代码的行为是当 L bit 未设置时直接把 inputSize-idx 作为 recordLength，这等价于消费剩余 datagram；该机制天然使后续记录不可再解析，但没有单独的显式校验/诊断。发送端总是设置 length，不会产生违规无长度中间记录。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
results.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:111; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1268; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1273; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1537
results.test_check: source_assertions 中 unified_header_length_bit_parse 通过：L bit 清除时消费剩余 datagram；发送端始终设置 L bit。
results.decision_reason: 实现不会发送违规中间无长度记录，接收端语义上把无 length 解释为最后记录，但缺少显式错误路径。

results.change_condition: when the L bit is cleared
results.new_value: record consumes the entire rest of the datagram in the lower level transport
results.extracted_evidence: which means that the record consumes the entire rest of the datagram in the lower level transport.
results.comment: 统一头解析支持 L bit、有长度字段和无长度字段，发送端当前总是包含 16-bit length。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 允许 DTLSCiphertext 最后一个记录省略 length，并要求显式 length 不能越过当前 datagram。wolfSSL 发送端固定设置 L bit 和 16-bit length；接收端按 L bit 解析，如果未设置则把剩余 datagram 作为记录长度，如果设置则读取 16-bit length 并进行头部/最小密文长度检查。

results.change_condition: when verifying the explicit record length
results.extracted_evidence: Do you verify that the explicit record length is contained within the datagram in which it is contained?
results.comment: 源码能证明读取 length 字段本身不会越界，但未看到显式 `idx + recordLength <= inputSize` 检查；后续处理依赖 recordLength 和输入缓冲边界。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
results.comparison_summary: RFC 检查问题要求确认显式 record length 包含在 datagram 内。wolfSSL 确认 length 字段的两个字节在 datagram 内，并设置 *size=recordLength，但 Dtls13ParseUnifiedRecordLayer 本身没有直接检查 idx+recordLength <= inputSize，因此严格证明不足。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
results.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:111; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1268; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1273; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1537
results.test_check: source_assertions 中 explicit_length_bound_direct_check 未通过，确认缺少直接边界检查证据；完整运行测试因当前未构建 DTLS 1.3 被阻塞。
results.decision_reason: 代码能读显式 length 并进行最小密文长度检查，但没有直接证明显式 length 被限制在 datagram 内。

results.change_condition: If the HelloRetryRequest message is used.
results.extracted_evidence: If the HelloRetryRequest message is used, the initial ClientHello and the HelloRetryRequest are included in the calculation of the transcript hash. The computation of the message hash for the HelloRetryRequest is done according to the description in Section 4.4.1 of [TLS13].
results.comment: HRR cookie/stateless路径使用 synthetic message_hash，并在 DTLS hash 中跳过 message_seq/fragment 字段。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.2, Replay Detection and Retransmission; Section 5.3 and RFC 8446 Section 4.4.1 transcript hash
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求 HRR transcript 包含初始 ClientHello 的 synthetic message_hash，并按 TLS 1.3 规则计算。wolfSSL 在 RestartHandshakeHashWithCookie 中写 message_hash handshake header、重置 handshake hash、hash cookie 内保存的 ClientHello hash，然后重构 HRR 并调用 Dtls13HashHandshake；后者只 hash msg_type/length 和 body，跳过 DTLS message_seq/fragment fields。

results.change_action: set to synthetic message carrying hash value
results.change_condition: The initial ClientHello is included in the handshake transcript after HelloRetryRequest processing.
results.related_state_or_step: handshake transcript handling with second ClientHello
results.extracted_evidence: The initial ClientHello is included in the handshake transcript as a synthetic "message_hash" message, so only the hash value is needed for the handshake to complete, though the complete HelloRetryRequest contents are needed.
results.comment: HRR cookie/stateless路径使用 synthetic message_hash，并在 DTLS hash 中跳过 message_seq/fragment 字段。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.2, Replay Detection and Retransmission; Section 5.3 and RFC 8446 Section 4.4.1 transcript hash
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求 HRR transcript 包含初始 ClientHello 的 synthetic message_hash，并按 TLS 1.3 规则计算。wolfSSL 在 RestartHandshakeHashWithCookie 中写 message_hash handshake header、重置 handshake hash、hash cookie 内保存的 ClientHello hash，然后重构 HRR 并调用 Dtls13HashHandshake；后者只 hash msg_type/length 和 body，跳过 DTLS message_seq/fragment fields。

results.change_condition: first message each side transmits in each association
results.extracted_evidence: The first message each side transmits in each association always has message_seq = 0.
results.comment: DTLS handshake sequence 使用 dtls_handshake_number/expected_peer_handshake_number 生成、检查、缓存乱序并丢弃旧序号。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.5, Handshake Message Format and Reordering
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 handshake message 有 message_seq：新消息递增，重传复用旧值，接收端按 next_receive_seq 处理、缓存或丢弃。wolfSSL 发送头写 dtls_handshake_number，通用旧 DTLS AddHeaders 会递增；DTLS 1.3 接收端维护 dtls_expected_peer_handshake_number，旧序号被识别为 retransmission 并丢弃/触发重传，未来序号进入 DtlsMsgStore 缓存，in-order ready message 才处理并递增 expected 值。

results.change_condition: post-handshake message exchange in DTLS 1.3
results.extracted_evidence: However, in DTLS 1.3 the message_seq is not reset, to allow distinguishing a retransmission from a previously sent post-handshake message from a newly sent post-handshake message.
results.comment: 代码中 post-handshake ACK/KeyUpdate 使用同一 DTLS 1.3 RTX/sequence 结构，但未能证明所有 post-handshake 消息永不重置 message_seq。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.5, Handshake Message Format and Reordering
results.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 handshake message 有 message_seq：新消息递增，重传复用旧值，接收端按 next_receive_seq 处理、缓存或丢弃。wolfSSL 发送头写 dtls_handshake_number，通用旧 DTLS AddHeaders 会递增；DTLS 1.3 接收端维护 dtls_expected_peer_handshake_number，旧序号被识别为 retransmission 并丢弃/触发重传，未来序号进入 DtlsMsgStore 缓存，in-order ready message 才处理并递增 expected 值。

results.change_condition: Handling a request considered excessive
results.new_value: fewer than num_cids CIDs, including no CIDs at all
results.related_state_or_step: Sending NewConnectionId in response to excessive RequestConnectionId
results.extracted_evidence: An endpoint MAY handle requests which it considers excessive by responding with a NewConnectionId message containing fewer than num_cids CIDs, including no CIDs at all.
results.comment: wolfSSL 实现了 RFC 9146/DTLS CID extension 和 DTLS 1.3 unified header CID bit，但未找到 RFC 9147 RequestConnectionId/NewConnectionId handshake 消息、num_cids 或 cid_spare 处理。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 9.1, New Connection ID; Section 9.2, Request Connection ID
results.comparison_summary: RFC 9147 定义 RequestConnectionId 和 NewConnectionId post-handshake 消息，RequestConnectionId.num_cids 请求对端生成若干 CID，NewConnectionId 以 usage=cid_spare 返回。源码搜索没有发现对应 handshake type、解析/发送函数、num_cids 字段或 cid_spare usage；现有代码只处理连接建立时的 connection_id extension 和固定本地 API 设置 CID。
results.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 9.1, New Connection ID; Section 9.2, Request Connection ID；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。

results.test_check: source_assertions 中 request_new_connection_id_absent 通过：未发现 RequestConnectionId/NewConnectionId/num_cids/cid_spare 实现。
results.decision_reason: 标准要求动态 CID 请求/响应 handshake 消息，源码只有 CID extension/API 和 unified header CID bit，没有对应 post-handshake 消息处理。

results.extracted_evidence: Endpoints SHOULD respond to RequestConnectionId by sending a NewConnectionId with usage "cid_spare" containing num_cids CIDs as soon as possible.

results.decision_reason: 标准要求动态 CID 请求/响应 handshake 消息，源码只有 CID extension/API 和 unified header CID bit，没有对应 post-handshake 消息处理。

results.change_action: validated range check for encrypted_record demultiplexing
results.extracted_evidence: 31 < OCT < 64 -+--> |DTLSCiphertext  |
results.comment: 首字节分流覆盖旧 content type 20/21/22 和 DTLS 1.3 unified header 固定位模式。
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.1.2, Record Payload Protection and demultiplexing table
results.comparison_summary: RFC demux table 将 20/21/22 映射为 CCS/Alert/Handshake plaintext，将 31<OCT<64 的固定模式识别为 DTLSCiphertext。wolfSSL 的 Dtls13IsUnifiedHeader 排除 alert/handshake/ack 后按固定 bit mask 识别 unified header；非 unified header 继续按传统 DTLS record type 解析，ContentType enum 定义了 20/21/22。
